sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand, and reports pain. The patient reports pain. The patient reports pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The doctor reports a slight three out of six systolic ejection murmur. The doctor reports 1 to 2+ pitting edema in the legs. The patient checks blood pressure at home weekly. The patient's blood pressure is elevated today.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has depression. The patient's hypertension is not well controlled. The patient has high blood pressure.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Norvasc will be increased to 10 mg a day. A lipid panel will be ordered. An echocardiogram will be ordered. The doctor recommends decreasing salt intake. The patient attends counseling once a week.
